title: mannequin focus — Verlet spring, CCD-IK, WASD walk, stiffness sync
description:
## Summary

- Full rewrite of `brett/public/index.html` as a pure 3D mannequin sandbox (~798 lines, down from ~3900)
- Adds Verlet-spring ragdoll physics with gravity-blended stiffness slider
- CCD-IK on contact-sphere drag with override/resume
- Click-to-walk + WASD walk system (4-state machine: IDLE/WALKING/DRAG_PAUSED)
- Six pose presets with immediate apply + WebSocket sync
- Server: adds `stiffness` broadcast message; drops `art-library` static mount; includes `appearance` handler from PR #746

## Test plan

- [ ] Load `brett.<domain>` and verify Three.js scene renders with floor + orbit camera
- [ ] Add a mannequin figure, drag contact spheres, verify IK updates joints
- [ ] Toggle stiffness slider, verify spring physics changes feel
- [ ] Click on floor to walk figure, verify WASD movement
- [ ] Apply pose presets, verify immediate snap + sync across clients
- [ ] Verify `appearance` messages still route correctly in server

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
